display.purpose: Page and modal titles. Max 2 per screen.

title.purpose: Navigation items, list item titles, table row labels.

body.purpose: Default text. Tables, paragraphs, form labels. Max line length 75ch.

label.purpose: Button text, form captions, badges, tabs.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Interactive cards and rows on hover.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (hover, focus, open/close).

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Manrope Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; letter-spacing: 0.04em; background: oklch(0.511 0.096 186.391); color: oklch(0.984 0.014 180.72); padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.43 0.096 186.391); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.511 0.096 186.391 / 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: oklch(0.38 0.096 186.391); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Manrope Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; letter-spacing: 0.04em; background: oklch(0.96 0.003 325.6); color: oklch(0.21 0.006 285.885); padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.92 0.005 325.6); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.511 0.096 186.391 / 0.3); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'Manrope Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; letter-spacing: 0.04em; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.511 0.096 186.391); padding: 10px 20px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.96 0.003 325.6); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.511 0.096 186.391 / 0.3); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Default text field for forms and search.
components.css: .ds-label { display: block; font-family: 'Manrope Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.25; letter-spacing: 0.04em; color: oklch(0.542 0.034 322.5); margin-bottom: 4px; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; font-family: 'Manrope Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.145 0.008 326); background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0.005 325.62); border-radius: 4px; padding: 10px 12px; height: 40px; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.542 0.034 322.5); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: oklch(0.511 0.096 186.391); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px oklch(0.511 0.096 186.391 / 0.3); } .ds-input:disabled { background: oklch(0.96 0.003 325.6); opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation in its default and active states.
components.html: DashboardInventoryOrdersCustomers
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; font-family: 'Manrope Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; color: oklch(0.542 0.034 322.5); padding: 10px 12px; border-radius: 4px; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.96 0.003 325.6); color: oklch(0.21 0.006 285.885); } .ds-nav-item-active { background: oklch(0.511 0.096 186.391); color: oklch(0.984 0.014 180.72); } .ds-nav-item-active:hover { background: oklch(0.43 0.096 186.391); color: oklch(0.984 0.014 180.72); }

components.name: Data Table
components.description: Default data table with header, rows, and hover state.
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-family: 'Manrope Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.145 0.008 326); } .ds-table thead th { font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.04em; text-transform: uppercase; color: oklch(0.542 0.034 322.5); text-align: left; padding: 8px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0.005 325.62); } .ds-table tbody td { padding: 10px 12px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0.005 325.62); } .ds-table tbody tr { transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-table tbody tr:hover { background: oklch(0.96 0.003 325.6); } .ds-table tbody tr:focus-within { background: oklch(0.96 0.003 325.6); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container for groupings and summaries.
components.html:
Inventory Summary

245 items in stock across 12 categories. 3 items below reorder threshold.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(1 0 0); border-radius: 0; padding: 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Manrope Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.3; color: oklch(0.145 0.008 326); margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Manrope Variable', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.5; color: oklch(0.542 0.034 322.5); margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
A pharmacy management desktop app that feels like a well-organized pharmacy counter: everything in its place, every surface clean, every interaction precise. The system balances medical authority with modern restraint — clinical without being cold, efficient without feeling rushed.

This is not a hospital system (cluttered, dated, low-contrast). Not an over-designed dashboard (decorative charts, gradient accents, glassmorphism). Not a generic SaaS product (round buttons, playful illustrations, cookie-cutter cards). It is a precise instrument for pharmacy staff who need speed and clarity under real pressure.
keyCharacteristics: Airy, light default theme with high contrast and generous whitespace
Flat surfaces with subtle elevation only on interactive states
Consistent 4px corner radius on interactive elements, sharp 0px on containers
Mauve-leaning neutrals for calm authority; teal accent for wayfinding and action
Typography-driven hierarchy; Manrope across all roles
Decoration is functional: borders, backgrounds, and spacing carry information

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Medical Teal is the only accent. It appears on ≤10% of any screen — primary buttons, active nav, selection states. If a second accent color is needed (e.g. for third-party integrations), it must be a desaturated variant within the teal hue family.

rules.name: The Contrast Rule
rules.body: No text on a tinted background without verification. Body text hits ≥4.5:1, large text ≥3:1. Muted text (Mauve Stone Deep) is never used for primary information.

rules.name: The No-Decoration Rule
rules.body: No gradient text, no drop caps, no fancy initial letters. Weight and size do the hierarchy work. The single weight axis of Manrope is enough.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only for floating UI (dropdowns, dialogs, tooltips) and hover states. Never apply static shadows to resting cards or panels.

dos: Do use Medical Teal as the sole accent, covering ≤10% of any screen.
Do keep containers sharp (0px radius); reserve 4px radius for interactive elements.
Do use the Mauve Stone neutral family for all non-accent surfaces and borders.
Do prefer tonal layering over shadows: shift background lightness to convey depth.
Do verify body text contrast ≥4.5:1 against its background.
Do use `text-wrap: balance` on display/headline text and `text-wrap: pretty` on long prose.
Do use compact table rows (40px) for data-dense screens and comfortable (48px) for interactive tables.
donts: Don't use a second accent color outside the teal hue family.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative blur effects.
Don't apply static shadows to resting cards, panels, or containers.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left/right >1px) as accent markers on cards or callouts.
Don't use the "hero-metric" template (big number + small label + gradient accent).
Don't add tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows (“INVENTORY” “ORDERS” “REPORTS”) above every section heading. One deliberate section label is voice; every section is AI grammar.
Don't use numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as default scaffolding. Numbers earn their place only when the sequence carries information (a real workflow, a step-by-step flow).
Don't use identical card grids (icon + heading + text, repeated endlessly).
Don't nest cards. Cards at one level only.
Don't use playful illustrations, emoji, or decorative icons in the interface.
Don't let display text overflow its container. Test every heading at every breakpoint.
